A Moby-Dick identity palette

Try-Works

A cold sea filling the frame, one amber fire low like the horizon, the whale white kept for headlines.

Fraunces display · after Melville, ch. 96

Fraunces as running text

Does the serif do both jobs?

Call me Ishmael. Some years ago, never mind how long precisely, having little or no money in my purse, and nothing particular to interest me on shore, I thought I would sail about a little and see the watery part of the world. Whenever I find myself growing grim about the mouth, whenever it is a damp, drizzly November in my soul, then I account it high time to get to sea as soon as I can.

Fraunces, optical size 11, wonk off, weight 400. If this reads comfortably, one serif covers display and text.

The tokens

A cold sea, one fire, the whale.

Sea — the structural field, four steps

Fire — the single warm hue, used sparingly

In use — the sea as ground

Mestrado em Informática da Saúde

Health data, read closely

The sea carries the weight of the block. The amber appears once, where the eye should land, and nowhere else.

A series, one group flagged

The identity at work.

AI in healthcare

What a model can and cannot be trusted to do

FMUP · MEDCIDSTiago Jacinto

Loomings

A reading, the Pequod sailing — 19h00

The rule

Sea is the large cold field: grounds, cards, data, supporting headers. Fire is the rare hot mark: one accent per view, where the eye should land. They never carry equal weight. Try-Fire is the dark mode, the furnace at night. True Lamp is the light mode, the natural sun on cold water: a sea-salt paper, the fire banked to a single mark. Flip Mode and Sans above.

Fraunces serif · Inter / Archivo sans · JetBrains Mono · all OFL, embedded, offline
